Book Consultation
Dubai web development agency · 12 years in UAE

Dubai web development that ships and ranks.

Webcore Solutions is a Dubai web development agency that has built 180+ websites for UAE businesses since 2012. Fixed-scope pricing, in-house team, Core Web Vitals on every release.

Scope a Dubai web projectSee full web development service

What we build

Every kind of Dubai website, under one roof.

Business and marketing sites

Fast, responsive, SEO-ready websites built to rank on Google UAE and convert UAE-based visitors.

Ecommerce and WooCommerce

Storefronts tuned for AED checkout, COD workflows, VAT compliance, and Dubai-friendly payment gateways.

Custom React and Next.js builds

Componentised frontends, headless CMS integrations, and API-driven pages that scale beyond brochureware.

Core Web Vitals and accessibility

Sub-second loads, WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility, and Lighthouse 95+ scores on every project before launch.

WordPress without the bloat

Custom Gutenberg blocks, editor-friendly admin, no drag-and-drop page builders that wreck performance.

Arabic-English bilingual

Right-to-left layouts, dual-language content models, and Arabic-aware search and indexing.

Why Dubai businesses pick Webcore Solutions

The honest version.

Dubai has hundreds of web development agencies. Most are good. A few are great. Webcore Solutions is in the second group, and we will not pretend otherwise.

We are also not the cheapest option. Dubai shoppers searching for “web development agency” on the cheap end will find dozens of freelancers and offshore resellers undercutting our rate. That is fair — they may be the right fit for some projects.

Where we win is when the project actually has to work: a high-traffic ecommerce launch, a custom Next.js platform that needs to load under one second, a WordPress migration without breaking SEO equity, a brand site that has to be accessible under UAE Federal Law No. 29.

Those are the engagements where a fixed-scope quote, a senior in-house team based in Dubai, and twelve years of compounded delivery make the difference between “launched” and “launched well”.

Get a Dubai web development quote.

45-minute scoping call. Fixed-scope quote within 48 hours. No hourly billing.

Request a Dubai web quote
